lines.text: The Verification desk is where you vet the suppliers who want to work on the network.
This is your first line of defence, no supplier should ever reach a client unchecked.
Every supplier shows their current status, and field audits on the ground drive these approvals.
You can see their company name, their contact, and any notes the field team has left after visiting them.
The status pill tells you instantly whether they're pending, audited, or fully approved.
Once a supplier has been physically audited on the ground, you mark them audited here.
And when they fully meet the standard, you approve them to bid on real jobs.
This gate is exactly why a client never deals with an unvetted operator, because you've already checked them.
